narrative:
Precinct West Mansfield (precinct in Logan County) has 494 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
